code: import{configureStore}from'@reduxjs/toolkit';import{apiSlice}from'./slices/apiSlice';import cartSliceReducer from'./slices/cartSlice';import authSliceReducer from'./slices/authSlice';const store=configureStore({reducer:{[apiSlice.reducerPath]:apiSlice.reducer,cart:cartSliceReducer,auth:authSliceReducer},middleware:getDefaultMiddleware=>getDefaultMiddleware().concat(apiSlice.middleware),devTools:true});export default store;
